name: studio-test-harness-control
description: Verify the Studio-only server and client test harnesses can deterministically control gameplay, world state, UI, camera, and settings without Windows input automation.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local a=game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild('PunchWallTestHarness',5) local r=a:Invoke({command='Describe'}) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,version=r.version,studioOnly=r.studioOnly,productionSurface=r.productionSurface,commands=#r.commands,locations=#r.catalog.locations,presets=#r.catalog.presets,ready=a:GetAttribute('Ready')})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallTestHarness local r=a:Invoke({command='Sequence',steps={{command='Reset'},{command='SetWorldResetEnabled',target=false},{command='ApplyPreset',target='Midgame'},{command='ClearCooldowns'},{command='Teleport',target='Training'},{command='SetSpinReady',amount=2},{command='ForcePetEggDrop',target=30},{command='Snapshot'}}}) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,count=r.count,failed=r.failedStep})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local s=p.RPGStats local root=p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') local inv=s.PetInventoryJSON.Value local map=workspace.PunchWallRPG return H:JSONEncode({ok=p.leaderstats.Power.Value==25000 and p.leaderstats.Coins.Value==500000 and p.leaderstats.Depth.Value==25 and s.FistMultiplier.Value==13 and s.SpinCredits.Value==2 and inv~='[]' and root and (root.Position-Vector3.new(-42,3,31)).Magnitude<2 and map:GetAttribute('AutomationWorldResetEnabled')==false,power=p.leaderstats.Power.Value,coins=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value,depth=p.leaderstats.Depth.Value,spin=s.SpinCredits.Value,petInventory=inv,position=root and tostring(root.Position) or 'missing',worldReset=map:GetAttribute('AutomationWorldResetEnabled')})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('PunchWallHUD',5) local a=g:WaitForChild('PunchWallClientTestHarness',5) local d=a:Invoke({command='Describe'}) local r=a:Invoke({command='Sequence',steps={{command='SetSettings',value={sound=false,motion=false,uiScale=.8}},{command='OpenTab',value='Fists'},{command='OpenShopPage',value='Premium'},{command='CloseMenus'},{command='OpenSpin'},{command='SetCamera',value={position={-26,11,43},lookAt={-42,4,24}}},{command='Snapshot'}}}) local s=a:Invoke({command='Snapshot'}).result return H:JSONEncode({ok=d.ok and d.studioOnly and d.productionSurface==false and r.ok and r.count==7 and s.spinVisible and s.sound==false and s.motion==false and s.uiScale==.8 and s.cameraType=='Scriptable',commands=#d.commands,count=r.count,spin=s.spinVisible,sound=s.sound,motion=s.motion,uiScale=s.uiScale,camera=s.cameraType,ready=a:GetAttribute('Ready')})

steps.label: control UI settings and camera through client harness

args.code: local a=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD.PunchWallClientTestHarness local r=a:Invoke({command='Sequence',steps={{command='CloseMenus'},{command='SetSettings',value={sound=true,motion=true,uiScale=1}},{command='ResetCamera'}}}) return r.ok and r.count==3 and 'CLIENT_RESTORED' or 'CLIENT_RESTORE_FAILED'

local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallTestHarness local r=a:Invoke({command='Sequence',steps={{command='SetWorldResetEnabled',target=true},{command='Reset'}}}) return r.ok and r.count==2 and 'SERVER_RESTORED' or 'SERVER_RESTORE_FAILED'
